user_query:
I’m helping a small volunteer huddle for the pediatric ward where I spent time as a kid. I still remember the playroom and how kind the nurses were, so I want to make sure our tasks are routed to the right teams and that our meeting notes capture the right memories and action items.

Please do the following using only the files in this workspace and produce the outputs under the specified paths:

1) Update routing rules
- File to modify: input/workflow.json
- Keep the existing mapping for "supplies" -> "volunteer-logistics" and the fallback_team as "unassigned".
- Add these new rules under routing.rules exactly:
  - "playroom" -> "child-life-team"
  - "pediatrics" -> "child-life-team"
  - "gratitude" -> "gratitude-committee"
- Do not change the script; only modify the configuration file so routing behavior changes come from config.

2) Route tasks using the updated config
- Use the provided script input/process_tasks.py (do not alter it) to read input/tasks.jsonl and the updated input/workflow.json, then write the routed results to output/assigned_tasks.jsonl.
- The script assigns the first matching tag per task based on the rules; otherwise it uses the fallback team. Ensure output/assigned_tasks.jsonl exists and contains all tasks with an assigned_team.

3) Prepare meeting notes with memories and action items
- Read these local notes:
  - input/notes/patient_feedback.md: Extract only lines beginning with "Memory:" or "Thanks:" and include the text after the colon, trimmed, in the same order.
  - input/notes/nurse_shift_notes.md: Extract only lines in the form "Action[TEAM]: description". TEAM will be one of child-life-team, gratitude-committee, or volunteer-logistics; keep the description text after the colon, trimmed.
- Create output/meeting_notes.md with two sections:
  - "Memories & Gratitude": a bullet list of the extracted Memory/Thanks items (text only, one item per bullet).
  - "Action Items by Team": for each team that appears either in output/assigned_tasks.jsonl or in the shift actions, create a subsection labeled with the team name. Under each team, include:
    - One bullet per routed task from output/assigned_tasks.jsonl assigned to that team in the format: [Task: ID — Title].
    - One bullet per shift action from nurse_shift_notes.md where the TEAM matches that subsection, using just the action description text.
- Ensure every task from output/assigned_tasks.jsonl appears exactly once under the correct team subsection, and every extracted shift action is included under its matching TEAM.

Input paths you must use:
- input/workflow.json (to be modified)
- input/process_tasks.py (use as-is)
- input/tasks.jsonl
- input/notes/patient_feedback.md
- input/notes/nurse_shift_notes.md

Required outputs:
- output/assigned_tasks.jsonl (routed task records with assigned_team)
- output/meeting_notes.md (with the two sections described above)

Please keep the task fully local—no external services—and make sure the outputs reflect the updated routing rules and the extracted notes accurately. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
